message:
feat(verifier_economy): replace placeholder checks with real Ed25519 attestation verification and capsule integrity hashing

Replace stub signature and integrity checks in the verifier economy module
with real cryptographic verification:

Attestation verification:
- New attestation_signature_payload() builds domain-separated length-prefixed
  preimage from all attestation fields (verifier_id, dimension, statement,
  score bits, suite_id, trace hash, measurements, environment, timestamp)
- verify_signature() now uses verify_ed25519_signature_hex from verifier_sdk
  with constant-time public key comparison, replacing the old
  !signature.is_empty() placeholder

Capsule integrity:
- verify_capsule_integrity() now validates all hash fields are sha256-prefixed
  hex strings via is_sha256_prefixed_hex()
- Recomputes integrity_hash via compute_capsule_integrity_hash() from
  verifier_sdk and compares with constant-time equality
- register_replay_capsule() and get_replay_capsule() both gate on integrity
  verification before accepting/returning capsules
- New ERR_VEP_INVALID_CAPSULE error code for failed integrity checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
